description: Four East Asian professionals, three men and one woman, sit around a dark wood table in a modern office. The men, around 40-50 years old, wear collared shirts and ties with dark trousers, one in a grey cardigan. The woman, in her late 30s, wears a teal blazer over a white top. Two men are gesturing with their hands, engaged in conversation, while the other two listen attentively. Their expressions are serious but friendly. Light streams in from a large window behind them, revealing a cityscape. A large, framed piece of art hangs on the wall. A decorative floral arrangement sits in the center of the table, atop documents. The room is bright, with white walls and dark furniture, creating a professional and calm atmosphere.
